transcript: Hey, it's Piff the Magic Dragon and Mr. Piffles, and we're finalists from season 10 of America's Got Talent. The great thing about this show is it's the best of the best from all over the world. So just getting to the competition, that's price enough. At least that's what I'm telling the dog, but he's not buying it. Your dog, he doesn't look like he wants to be here. I can't cheer him up. After we left AGT, we flew back to Vegas. The next day, we got a show. We got our own show, the Piff the Magic Dragon show, at the Flamingo Hotel and Casino. Mr. Piffles and I just got the theatre renamed the Piff the Magic Dragon Theatre. Heidi and Mr. Piffles would like to offer you a complimentary ring cleaning service. Would you like that? I would love it. It's very good. He's been cleaning his own ring for years. Tonight on stage, we did a new bit that we've been working on for the past few months, getting ready for champions. Now, Heidi, Mr. Pipples is going to lick all of the food off of your ring, leaving it as gleaming as the day that you bought it for yourself. Mr. Pipples cleaned one of Heidi's rings, and well, heidi seemed happy with the results on the count of three give him a squeeze one two three oh oh lovely good job buddy the judges were great it was great to go on there and hear what they had to say because Mr. Pibbles and I, we haven't won America's Got Talent. We were back here as runners-up slash losers. You have been one of the best ambassadors for the show to give people trust to come on the show. So I owe you a lot. Thank you. You're a good guy. Thanks, guys.
